entity.summary: Permissionless leveraged AMM decentralized exchange supporting spot swaps, liquidity, lending-market creation, and futures trading across Avalanche and Base deployments.
entity.notes: Current first-party FWX application endpoint remains reachable as a JavaScript application. DefiLlama independently describes FWX as a permissionless leveraged AMM DEX with permissionless lending-market creation and futures trading and reports current TVL across Base and Avalanche. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party application content is not server-rendered.

evidence.title: FWX official application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party FWX application endpoint remains reachable and serves the exchange application shell.

evidence.title: FWX DEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry describes FWX as a permissionless leveraged AMM DEX with lending-market creation and futures trading and reports TVL across Base and Avalanche plus cumulative DEX volume.

evidence.title: FWX DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies FWX DEX across Avalanche and Base.
